tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"iptables -N ICMP_OUT_LIMIT 2>/dev/null || true
iptables -F ICMP_OUT_LIMIT 2>/dev/null || true
iptables -A ICMP_OUT_LIMIT -m limit --limit 20/second --limit-burst 50 -j RETURN
iptables -A ICMP_OUT_LIMIT -j DROP
iptables -I OUTPUT -p icmp -m comment --comment "Limit outbound ICMP" -j ICMP_OUT_LIMIT
iptables -L ICMP_OUT_LIMIT -v -n"}
